description: Live LTS+COS+restrictions (NF_TABLES=n, IO_URING=n, USER_NS_UNPRIVILEGED=n). Replay the historical CVE-2024-1086 trigger and check the captured dmesg for a KASAN report. Expected: 'inconclusive' (no_crash ≠ safe; restrictions removed the bug's surface and the trigger could not fire).

Positive control: same hypothesis routed against the Phase-0.4 historical kernel dmesg (NF_TABLES=y, exploit fires). Expected: 'confirmed' — proves the loop dispatches identically against the live and historical kernels and only the surface differs.
